## Highlights

Maintenance release. **No adopter-facing behaviour change.**

- Trimmed always-loaded `CLAUDE.md` by ~3 KB. D17–D22 prose moved to `PLAN.md` / per-decision migration notes (load-on-demand).
- `PLAN.md` reclassified from "always-loaded" to "other watched" in the context-economy gate (50-line / 2-KB threshold instead of 25 / 1).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1
